title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIT Kanpur

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at IIT Kanpur
jsonLd.description:
IIT Kanpur, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Kanpur:
IIT Kanpur is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Support students with special educational needs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Pedagogy

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Kanpur!
